tweets.content: Hope I don't stutter too much. 🤣

Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Looks like Power Semis are already starting price hikes. Which is bullish thematically for US power semi trade from $AOSL to $POWI, before the 800V DC shift fully hits. China's Yangjie Technology, announced a 2nd price increase this year, raising prices across its full product range by 10%-15%, July 1. Chongqing China Resources Micro, Silan Microelectronics, and NCE Power also price hiked. “Demand is playing a larger role than costs in the latest round of price increases” from AI DCs, to energy systems, and new EVs. Another potential beneficiary is the upstream material companies that make these: - nonferrous metals like copper and tin. -Plastic molding compounds - chemicals, and packaging consumables “Nearly all major Chinese power semiconductor makers have raised prices in 2026.” (Digitimes) So positive read through on power semi adjacent (reduce China-driven price pressure + better pricing + demand validation)
tweets.translated: 看起来 Power Semis 已经开始涨价了。在 800V DC 转变完全到来之前，这对美国电力半贸易从 $AOSL 到 $POWI 的主题是看涨的。 7月1日，扬杰科技宣布今年第二次涨价，全线产品涨价10%-15%。重庆华润微、士兰微、新电电源也纷纷涨价。从人工智能 DC 到能源系统和新型电动汽车，“在最新一轮价格上涨中，需求发挥着比成本更大的作用”。另一个潜在的受益者是制造这些产品的上游材料公司： - 铜和锡等有色金属。 -塑料模塑料-化学品和包装耗材“几乎所有中国主要功率半导体制造商都在2026年提高了价格。” （Digitimes）对电力半相邻的积极解读（减少中国驱动的价格压力+更好的定价+需求验证）

tweets.content: Nah, gonna fill out the job application for $WEN and set up camp behind the dumpsters. Even $MU and $SNDK ridiculous performance today couldn't save my port. Cheering on Japan though, hoping Sweden gets mogged with a 2-0 to represent the 20% drop.
tweets.translated: 不，要填写一份工作申请表并支付 $WEN，然后在垃圾箱后面扎营。即使今天 $MU 和 $SNDK 荒谬的表现也无法拯救我的端口。不过还是为日本加油吧，希望瑞典能以 2-0 的比分击败日本，代表着 20% 的降幅。

tweets.content: oh i think u misunderstand... I'm actually more bullish than ever as prices go down. $SIVE at ~$1.9B MC you have: - $GFS reference laser - laser for Ayar and others in $NVDA NVLink ecosystem for CPO scale up - $POET and others for CPO scale out - $JBL and others for 1.6T+ pluggable optical transcivers - O-Net for ELS mass production So you have all these hyperscaler suppliers trying to create as much as possible with Sivers as the laser bottleneck... And it's just a matter of how much Win Semi + others partners can make, with $SIVE receiving ~60% gross margins + optionality to TAM expand downward. The 15% recent share expansion that Swedish media have been bearposting is for NASDAQ listing float + M&A (and it's authorization). You just have potential short sellers running illegal bot farms, Swedish media bearposting a company Swedish exchange, on top of a general macro drop. The ~$140M convertible note is real, but it's pennies to US institutions. We'll likely see more institutional ownership when data comes out. But this is also why it's good for $SIVE to prioritize NASDAQ listing so they don't need to deal with this noise and local media. With $AAOI at $10B, you have: - A end-to-end US laser/design/assembly player projecting $471m month revenue H1 entering H2 2027. - With other hyperscalers like $AMD apparently discussing LTAs. And they probably are sitting on a ton of cash after running ~$1.4B in ATMs (400M + 400m+ 600m). Kinda all that needs to be said with those insane revenue projections as long as management doesn't BS. This just reminds me of when $NBIS crashed to $70 last year even while projecting $7-9B ARR, and as timelines got closer it recovered to $250+. Feels like dejavu. I'm just waiting for both volume ramps to hit. Photonics are generally more volatile than the rest.
tweets.translated: 哦，我想你误解了...随着价格下跌，我实际上比以往任何时候都更加看涨。 $SIVE 在 ~$1.9B MC 上，您拥有： - $GFS 参考激光器 - 用于 Ayar 和其他 $NVDA NVLink 生态系统中的激光器，用于 CPO 扩展 - $POET 和其他用于 CPO 扩展 - $JBL 和其他用于 1.6T+ 可插拔光收发器 - O-Net 用于 ELS 大规模生产 因此，所有这些超大规模供应商都试图以 Sivers 作为激光器瓶颈来创造尽可能多的产品...这只是赢多少的问题Semi + 其他合作伙伴可以赚钱，$SIVE 获得约 60% 的毛利率 + TAM 向下扩展的选项。瑞典媒体最近宣扬的15%的扩股是为了纳斯达克上市+并购（及其授权）。除了宏观经济普遍下跌之外，还有潜在的卖空者经营着非法的机器人农场，瑞典媒体还贴出了一家瑞典交易所的广告。约 1.4 亿美元的可转换票据是真实的，但对美国机构来说只是几美分。当数据公布时，我们可能会看到更多的机构所有权。但这也是为什么 $SIVE 优先在纳斯达克上市是有好处的，这样他们就不需要处理这种噪音和当地媒体。当 $AAOI 为 $10B 时，您将拥有： - 一家端到端美国激光/设计/组装厂商预计上半年收入为 4.71 亿美元，进入 2027 年下半年。 - 与 $AMD 等其他超大规模厂商显然正在讨论 LTA。在 ATM 机上运行了约 $1.4B 后，他们可能坐拥大量现金（400M + 400m+ 600m）。只要管理层不胡说八道，所有这些疯狂的收入预测都需要说。这让我想起去年 $NBIS 暴跌至 70 美元，尽管预计 ARR 为 7-9B 美元，但随着时间的临近，它恢复到 250 美元以上。感觉就像似曾相识。我只是在等待两个音量上升。光子学通常比其他学科更不稳定。
